description_long: This house features a prominent red-tiled gable roof with intersecting sections, creating a visually dynamic silhouette. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray or off-white color, complemented by white window frames and trim. The front facade includes a covered porch with a small overhang supported by columns, and a central entry door flanked by windows. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, providing ample natural light to the interior. The rear of the house features a balcony or covered patio area, visible through wide glass doors. The overall design is spacious, with a balanced and inviting appearance suitable for suburban or urban neighborhoods.
description: A spacious two-story house with a red-tiled gable roof, light-colored walls, and symmetrical window arrangements. Features include a covered front porch, large windows, and a rear balcony or patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, central door, and symmetrically placed windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended roofline and a secondary entrance or open area beneath the roof overhang.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a balcony or covered patio with large glass doors and additional windows above.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a simple facade, two windows, and the extended roof structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a covered porch, overhanging roof, and supporting columns
